rect.style: stroke: rgb(58, 58, 58); stroke-opacity: 1; fill: rgb(0, 0, 0); fill-opacity: 0; stroke-width: 0px;

text.style: font-family: Geist, Inter, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 18px; fill: rgb(255, 255, 255); fill-opacity: 1; white-space: pre;

text.tspan: What GPUs Run in Hours… DynoSim Runs in Seconds.

g.text: Discrete-event simulation of the full Dynamo inference stack — 1000s of configs/min on a single CPU thread.
